title: aegilops tauschii f. ferruginea
intro: Aegilops tauschii f. ferruginea, also known as Ferrugineous Wolgograd Triticum, is a subspecies of the wild wheat plant Aegilops tauschii, which belongs to the family Poaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aegilops tauschii f. ferruginea include its ability to treat digestive issues, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol and blood pressure levels. The herbal preparations of Aegilops tauschii f. ferruginea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
